_doc: Curated raw-unreal.* → bridge-equivalent map. Each entry causes preflight to emit a warning (NOT a rejection) when the raw pattern appears, with the bridge-equivalent code shown inline. Driven by audit-log evidence: only patterns observed in real agent runs go in here. Add more as new fallbacks surface in exec.log.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Asset
Asset.search_assets(query=..., scope=unreal.BridgeAssetSearchScope.ALL_ASSETS, class_filter=..., case_sensitive=False, whole_word=False, max_results=..., min_characters=1, custom_package_path='')
# OR for path-restricted listing:
Asset.list_assets_under_path(folder_path=..., include_subfolders=True)
redirects.reason: Raw asset registry walks bypass preflight, audit logging, and have no token-cost guard — bridge wrappers do all three. ALL_ASSETS scope catches plugin assets PROJECT scope misses.
Direct bridge equivalent. Returns paths instead of AssetData objects, so no .asset_class_path attribute confusion.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Asset
Asset.search_assets(query='', scope=unreal.BridgeAssetSearchScope.ALL_ASSETS, class_filter='Blueprint', case_sensitive=False, whole_word=False, max_results=-1, min_characters=0, custom_package_path='')
redirects.reason: search_assets with class_filter is the bridge-canonical way; works across plugin mounts where /Game-only walks miss assets.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Asset
refs = Asset.get_package_referencers(package_name=..., hard_only=True)
# OR for both deps + refs in one call:
deps, refs = Asset.get_asset_references(asset_path=...)
redirects.reason: Bridge wrapper takes a package name string instead of AssetIdentifier struct — much less ceremony.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Asset
deps = Asset.get_package_dependencies(package_name=..., hard_only=True)
# OR for both deps + refs in one call:
deps, refs = Asset.get_asset_references(asset_path=...)
redirects.reason: Same as get_referencers — string in, list out, no AssetIdentifier dance.
Static-form variant of the chained call. Same redirect.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Level
actor_paths = Level.find_actors_by_class(class_path=..., max_results=-1)
redirects.reason: Bridge returns actor paths (strings), avoiding the result-type confusion that hitting raw UObject lists triggers.

redirects.bridge_replacement:
from unreal_bridge import Level
actor_paths = Level.find_actors_by_tag(tag=...)
redirects.reason: Tag-based actor lookup; bridge returns paths.
